title: convolvulus tricornutus
intro: Convolvulus tricornutus, also known as the thorny bindweed or three-horned bindweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus tricornutus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and can also be dried and powdered for use in herbal teas or capsules.
